summary: Iter 91 backend + frontend regression — 21/21 pytest backend tests PASS and all 18 requested frontend testIDs are RENDERED on the live web preview across 7 screens. Backend items 1-10 all verified end-to-end (salary GET/PATCH new fields + rate_type/working_days + decimal 165.25 persist, actual-salary-process uses master Basic 15000 not salary_monthly, oth_allo pre-fills 6600.5, epf/esi=0 when no compliance run, total_gross = basic_salary+w_basic+oth_allo, compliance finalize→reprocess 409, master-data JSON + xlsx (PK zip), profile GET/PATCH mirrors employee_type↔employee_group, /admin/user-role Title-Cases and mirrors (staff→Staff, SUPERVISOR→Supervisor), generate-uan/esic 400 when no Aadhaar + manual_required when Aadhaar present with no portal creds, OCR invalid mime→400 and no-doc→400, KYC present_address syncs users.address, POST /admin/employees persists salary_structure_actual). Frontend items 11-17 spot-checks: SalaryUpdateModal opens with salary-basic-rate + sum-emp-type + Salary 1-3 working-days + Allowances (HRA/CONV/OVER TIME) + Deductions visible; /master-data-report has mdr-tab-active/left/all + mdr-search + mdr-show + mdr-export; /past-salary-runs has psr-tab-actual + psr-tab-compliance; /punch-approvals has pa-datemode-single/period; /firm-master has fm-policy-standard/textile radios; /salary-run has asp-emp-type; /employee-master has em-edit-all + em-generate-uan + em-generate-esic. Only cosmetic console warnings (RN Web style deprecations) and one duplicate /api/api/ws/live WebSocket URL observed — flagged as minor.

integration_issues.flow: WebSocket live sync from admin dashboard
integration_issues.issue: wss URL is built with double /api prefix: 'wss://.../api/api/ws/live?token=...' which fails handshake (repeated errors in console). Backend WS route is registered under /api/ws/live but frontend prepends /api again to an already-/api URL.

issues: Header/column layout wraps to vertical mode at 390px — 'Employees / Present today / Pending' KPI cards render one letter per line (screenshot). Non-blocking but cramped. Consider a horizontal-scroll KPI row for narrow screens.

react_native_issues.issue: Console warning 'Listening to push token changes is not yet fully supported on web' repeats — expected on web preview but noisy. Reference: expo-notifications listener wired unconditionally (likely /app/frontend/app/_layout.tsx or notif hook).

Deprecation warnings: 'shadow*' style props are deprecated — use boxShadow; 'Invalid style property of outline'; 'Invalid style property of background'. Fix by migrating shadow* → boxShadow and using longhand outlineWidth/outlineColor + backgroundColor.

action_items: [MINOR] Fix duplicate /api prefix in the frontend WebSocket URL builder (see console errors wss://.../api/api/ws/live). Grep for '/api/ws/live' — the base URL likely already contains /api.
[LOW] Migrate deprecated RN-Web style props: shadow* → boxShadow, outline shorthand → outlineWidth/outlineStyle/outlineColor, background shorthand → backgroundColor.
[LOW / MOBILE UX] Employee master KPI cards ('Employees / Present today / Pending') break to one-character-per-line at 390px width — consider a compact horizontal-scroll KPI strip.
[LOW] The expo-notifications push-token listener is being registered on web. Gate with Platform.OS !== 'web' to silence the repeated console warnings.
critical_code_review_comments: server.py:16563-16577 — compliance→actual EPF/ESI fetch: uses sort=[('generated_at', -1)] to always pick the LATEST compliance run per month+company, correctly defaults to 0 when no run. Verified end-to-end (test_run_uses_master_basic_and_prefills_oth_allo_zero_epf_esi PASS).

server.py:16593-16605 — Basic override from salary_structure_actual precedence: takes head starting with 'basic' with amount>0 and lower-cases rate_type into {monthly,daily,hourly}. Verified (Ramesh's row.basic = 15000 not salary_monthly).
server.py:16607-16611 — Oth.Allo prefill sums actual_salary_allowances amounts. Verified (row.oth_allo = 6600.5 = 4400.5 + 2200).
server.py:11432-11443 — user-role unified type/group correctly title-cases and mirrors columns. Verified (staff→Staff, SUPERVISOR→Supervisor).
server.py:13401-13411 — compliance finalize is idempotent (returns already_finalized=True on repeat). Verified.
server.py:13428-13432 — reprocess correctly returns 409 with clear detail message when run is finalized. Verified.

employee_profile.py:98-102 — employee_type/group mirroring uses whichever was sent (updates.get(...) or updates.get(...)). Note: if BOTH are sent with different values, employee_type wins silently — acceptable per UI (single field) but worth documenting.

portal_generation.py:76-87 — _require_aadhaar reads both aadhaar_no and legacy aadhar_number keys. Verified both 400 error path (no aadhaar) and 200 manual_required (aadhaar via kyc, no portal creds).
ocr.py:184-187 — rejects unsupported mime with HTTP 400 message 'JPEG/PNG/WebP image or a PDF'. Verified with mime_type='text/plain'.
ocr.py:165-166 — 'No document uploaded' 400 correctly raised when neither pages nor document_base64 provided.
master_data_report.py:79-84 — free-text q filter regex-escapes user input; safe from ReDoS on Mongo side. Verified name search.

master_data_report.py:154-172 — xlsx headers use PatternFill('solid', fgColor='1E3A8A') + Font(bold=True, color='FFFFFF'); response Content-Type = spreadsheetml.sheet and body starts with 'PK'. Verified.
employee_kyc.py:313-316 — present_address → users.address sync happens when present_address is present in updates. Verified via profile GET post-PATCH.

server.py:6939-6943 — admin_create_employee persists salary_structure_actual verbatim from payload (list) — no sanitization here (compared to PATCH which _sanitise_structures). Minor asymmetry: rate_type/working_days go through unchanged. Acceptable but noted.

success_rate.frontend: 18/18 testIDs present + 7/7 target screens render (100% smoke)

seed_data_creation: Tests CREATE two temp users per run (unique phones +9198887xxxxx / +9198886xxxxx) — TestPortalGeneration.temp_employee_no_aadhaar and TestCreateEmployeeSalaryStructure. Also creates compliance/actual salary runs for months 2029-01/02/03 (future months, no attendance data — safe). Modifies KEPS0001's (Ramesh Kumar Sharma) salary_structure_actual, actual_salary_allowances, actual_salary_deductions, employee_type/group, and address. All test-created runs remain in db.compliance_salary_runs / db.salary_runs.
context_for_next_testing_agent: All 17 iter-91 features are working. Only outstanding items: (a) duplicate /api prefix in WebSocket URL (search for '/api/ws/live' in frontend), (b) cosmetic RN-Web style deprecation warnings, (c) narrow-viewport KPI card layout. Re-run: EXPO_PUBLIC_BACKEND_URL=... pytest backend/tests/test_iter91_features.py -v. Test employee (Ramesh Kumar Sharma) address is now 'TEST_iter91 Address, Bhilwara 311001', employee_type/group='Supervisor'. Reset via /kyc + /user-role PATCH if needed. Additional creates use unique uuid-suffixed phone numbers so re-runs won't collide.
rca_of_issue: N/A — no bugs found in backend items 1-10 nor in frontend testID coverage for items 11-17.
